dinners hotel if necessary

--- Gmax <gmax1@mindspring.com> wrote:

> Just checking in and want an answer on Lance - will
> call you later. What news today?
> 
> G
> 
> -----Original Message-----
> From: "lance calloway" <gotham27@hotmail.com>
> Date: Sat, 29 Jul 2006 08:12:10 
> To:gmax1@mindspring.com
> 
> ms maxwell, 
>   
> regarding what we talked about i was requesting
> august 4th and august 5th off to fly back to texas
> for my grandfathers 75th b-day.  i will return on
> august 6th to new york.  the big favor that i was
> needing was if i could put the flight to tx on the
> amex. if not its not a big deal, i just need the
> days off.  i purchased maren's ticket already before
> they went up too much.  i found a flight for myself
> at $400 although its a different flight from her
> flight it's ok.  not knowing where we were going to
> be i didnt know where to purchase the ticket from. 
> as of right now its out of newark and i have it on
> hold until midnight tonight.  i very much appreciate
> if you can help.  i really hate asking for things
> but it is important to me to see my grandfather this
> time.  thank you.   
>   
> lance 
>   
> by the way you are the best ha
---------------------------------


ms maxwell,
 
regarding what we talked about i was requesting august
4th and august 5th off to fly back to texas for my
grandfathers 75th b-day.  i will return on august 6th
to new york.  the big favor that i was needing was if
i could put the flight to tx on the amex. if not its
not a big deal, i just need the days off.  i purchased
maren's ticket already before they went up too much. 
i found a flight for myself at $400 although its a
different flight from her flight it's ok.  not knowing
where we were going to be i didnt know where to
purchase the ticket from.  as of right now its out of
newark and i have it on hold until midnight tonight. 
i very much appreciate if you can help.  i really hate
asking for things but it is important to me to see my
grandfather this time.  thank you.   
 
lance
 
by the way you are the best ha

whole trip for lance and girlfriend on me...whole trip
dinners hotel if necessary

ms maxwell,

regarding what we talked about i was requesting
august 4th and august 5th off to fly back to texas
for my grandfathers 75th b-day. i will return on
august 6th to new york. the big favor that i was
needing was if i could put the flight to tx on the
amex. if not its not a big deal, i just need the
days off. i purchased maren's ticket already before
they went up too much. i found a flight for myself
at $400 although its a different flight from her
flight it's ok. not knowing where we were going to
be i didnt know where to purchase the ticket from.
as of right now its out of newark and i have it on
hold until midnight tonight. i very much appreciate
if you can help. i really hate asking for things
but it is important to me to see my grandfather this
time. thank you.

lance

by the way you are the best ha

ms maxwell,

grandfather this time. thank you.

lance

subject: Re: Fw:
body:
no no no ...  much too islamic...needs to be more
italian village..  the rooms need to change angles///
ortherwise all the windows face the sea . and unlike
the alhambra... the higher yhou go. the less pleasnt
as you see no foreground and no landscape. only
violent wave action in day and pitch black at night ..
 I want to get away from that....  too many gardens,,,
a mainetenance nigthmare...   this is an
island...outdoor showers for the guest,, indoor bath..
the spaces are not intimate...  very difficult to
service..   too imposing...  you must remember this is
both a hurricane and earthquake zone... the wind is
constant... and staff area... where do they stay
during the day,, this architecural vocabulary is very
difficult to execute well. in hurrican zones... the
alhambra has no glass... no airconditioning.. the
views on the island have to be framed and carefully
directed... ...don't despair... but  have you put this
on the topo or map///
